description_long: This is a round ceramic plate with a terracotta-colored base and a highly decorative floral and geometric pattern on its top surface. The central motif features a starburst design in red and teal, surrounded by five petal-like sections, each filled with intricate white floral patterns on a red background. The rim of the plate is smooth and unadorned, with a subtle matte finish that complements the ornate top. The sides of the plate are plain, emphasizing the contrast between the decorative face and the simple body. The plate appears solid and well-crafted, suitable for both display and functional use in a kitchen or dining setting.
description: A round terracotta-colored ceramic plate with ornate red, teal, and white floral and geometric patterns on its top surface and a plain, smooth rim.
description_view_0: Top view showing the full decorative pattern with starburst and floral motifs in red, teal, and white.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, smooth terracotta-colored rim with no visible decoration.
description_view_2: Bottom view, nearly identical to the top, showing the same ornate pattern and color scheme.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain, smooth terracotta-colored rim.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative floral and geometric patterns are visible on the top surface.
